summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GetLocal V2 Phase 7 - Razorpay Payment Gateway Integration. All 18 backend pytest tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. Payment system works in MOCK MODE (placeholder Razorpay keys) - credits are added directly without real checkout.
passed_tests: GET /nextapi/wallet?employer_id=new - Returns balance=0, unlockedCandidates=[]
POST /nextapi/payments/create-order - 10 credits = 50000 paise with mock=true
POST /nextapi/payments/create-order - 25 credits = 100000 paise
POST /nextapi/payments/create-order - 50 credits = 175000 paise
POST /nextapi/payments/create-order - Invalid credits (7) returns 400
POST /nextapi/payments/create-order - Missing employer_id returns 400
POST /nextapi/payments/verify - Mock=true adds credits directly
POST /nextapi/payments/verify - Credits accumulate (10+25=35)
POST /nextapi/payments/verify - Invalid credits returns 400
POST /nextapi/unlock - Returns 402 (insufficient_credits) when balance=0
POST /nextapi/unlock - Deducts exactly 1 credit (10->9)
POST /nextapi/unlock - Returns phone number on success
POST /nextapi/unlock - Already unlocked returns success without deduction
POST /nextapi/unlock - Missing candidateId returns 400
POST /nextapi/unlock - Invalid candidateId returns 404
E2E: Create order -> Verify -> Unlock -> Check balance flow
UI: '0 Credits + Buy' button visible when balance=0
UI: Credit balance button opens Buy Credits modal
UI: Clicking Unlock with 0 credits opens Buy Credits modal (not alert)
UI: Buy Credits modal shows 3 packs (10, 25, 50) with correct prices
UI: Selecting pack and Confirm Buy adds credits in mock mode
UI: Modal closes after successful purchase
UI: Credit balance updates in header after purchase (25 Credits)
UI: Credit balance updates after unlock (10->9 Credits)
UI: Phone and WhatsApp HIDDEN when profile is locked
UI: Phone and WhatsApp VISIBLE after profile is unlocked
UI: Phone number revealed (+91 99887 84545) after unlock

mocked_integrations.Razorpay Payment Gateway: MOCKED - Using placeholder keys (rzp_test_PLACEHOLDER). In mock mode, create-order returns mock order ID and verify with mock=true adds credits directly without real payment checkout.

seed_data_creation: Created test employers with prefixes test-pay-, test-unlock-, test-ui- for payment and unlock testing. Test wallets with varying credit balances created during pytest.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 7 Razorpay Payment Gateway integration fully tested. Backend test file: /app/getlocal/tests/test_payments_v1.py. All payment APIs working in MOCK mode (placeholder keys). Key flows: 1) Wallet shows 0 credits for new employers, 2) Create order validates credit packs (10/25/50 only), 3) Verify with mock=true adds credits directly, 4) Unlock costs 1 credit and returns 402 when insufficient. UI: Buy Credits modal opens from header button or when clicking Unlock with 0 credits. Modal shows 3 packs with correct prices. Mock purchase adds credits immediately. Phone/WhatsApp buttons only visible after unlock.
